store.name: Viki Agent Store
store.tagline: Agent skills & plugins, ready to install.
store.description: A curated marketplace of portable agent plugins — each a self-contained bundle of skills that teach your AI coding agent to design interfaces, build native macOS apps, and produce polished launch videos.
store.author: Vignesh Ramamoorthy

plugins.name: Design
plugins.tagline: A visual design language plus motion for every UI you build.
plugins.description: Visual design language plus motion for all UI output. Bundles two skills: clean-ux (design specs — tokens, typography, buttons, cards, accordions, sidebars, modals) and motion-ux (emotionally-driven, technically-sound animation — timing, easing, choreography, and Disney animation principles). Use when building landing pages, web apps, or dashboards and bringing them to life with animation.
plugins.author: LottieFiles · Design System
highlights: Design tokens: colors, typography, spacing & radius
Components: buttons, cards, modals, sidebars, tabs
Disney animation principles adapted for UI

skills.name: clean-ux
skills.author: Design System
skills.description: Visual design language for all UI output. Every component, layout, and page should follow the design specs in the module files — tokens, typography, buttons, cards, accordions, sidebars, modals, and more.

skills.name: motion-ux
skills.author: LottieFiles
skills.description: Applies motion design principles to create emotionally-driven, technically sound animations. Provides timing, easing, choreography, and Disney animation principles adapted for UI. Works with CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP, Lottie, or Spring.

plugins.name: Notch Companion App
plugins.tagline: Build native macOS apps that live under the MacBook notch.
plugins.description: Playbook for building lightweight, native macOS "notch companion" apps — agent apps (no Dock/menu-bar icon) that hide under the MacBook notch and react to the cursor with fluid, physics-driven animation drawn in code. Covers building without Xcode (SwiftPM + hand-assembled .app), a transparent click-through overlay over the notch, a 0%-idle-CPU animation loop, spring/Verlet physics + gesture systems, global mouse monitors, context menus, code-drawn art & app icons, headless testing, and DMG/GitHub distribution. Use when building NotchPaw or any variant (e.g. a pull-chain that locks the screen, a notch pet, a notch gauge/widget, a peeking character).
plugins.author: NotchPaw
highlights: Build without Xcode using SwiftPM + a hand-assembled .app
Transparent, click-through overlay pinned under the notch
0%-idle-CPU animation loop with spring / Verlet physics
Global mouse monitors, context menus & DMG distribution

skills.name: notch-companion-app
skills.author: NotchPaw
skills.description: End-to-end playbook for lightweight macOS notch companion apps: transparent overlay over the notch, cursor-reactive physics animation, global mouse monitoring, code-drawn art and icons, headless testing, and DMG/GitHub distribution.

plugins.name: Product Launch
plugins.tagline: Turn a raw demo recording into a polished launch video.
plugins.description: Turns a product demo recording into a polished, motion-designed product launch video. Probes and reviews the footage, tightens dead air, assembles the best moments, then adds a branded intro, synced feature captions, transitions, a logo bug, an outro CTA, and a final logo + name end-card, plus an original synthesized music bed and UI sound effects. Cross-platform engine (ffmpeg + Python: Pillow + numpy) that runs on macOS, Windows, and Linux, with an optional macOS-native Swift/AVFoundation fast path. Use when someone asks to create a launch / promo / teaser / "show-off" / Product Hunt / social video from a screen recording or product demo. ALWAYS ask the user for a demo recording (and any missing product details) the moment this skill is triggered if they were not already provided.
plugins.author: product-launch skill
highlights: Probes footage & tightens dead air automatically
Branded intro, synced captions, logo bug & outro CTA
Original synthesized music bed + UI sound effects
Cross-platform ffmpeg + Python, optional Swift fast path

skills.name: product-launch
skills.author: product-launch skill
skills.description: Assembles the best demo moments and layers on a branded intro, synced feature captions, transitions, a logo bug, an outro CTA, an end-card, plus a synthesized music bed and UI SFX — rendered with a cross-platform ffmpeg + Python engine.
